untranslatable_reason: Signal relies on pattern-specific characteristics not quantifiable with allowed indicators: (1) 'Left bottom below right bottom' requires multi-bar pattern recognition and absolute price level comparison across bottoms; (2) 'Price variation from bottom low to bottom low measured against median' requires historical bottom identification and dynamic baseline calculation not available in indicator set; (3) Exact volume trend classification (falling vs rising) requires volume moving average comparison logic that is incomplete without direction specification; (4) Success rates are regime/market-dependent but cannot be encoded as conditional rules
